summary: Message data model and Telegram channel/message fetching operations
side_effects: API calls to Telegram to resolve usernames and fetch message history
notes: Defines Message struct (ID, Text, Timestamp) as application-level message model, separate from storage.Message. ResolveChannel() converts @username string to tg.InputChannel by calling Telegram API. FetchMessages() retrieves message history from a channel, filters out empty/service messages via extractMessages() helper. Handles different response types from Telegram API (MessagesMessages, MessagesMessagesSlice, MessagesChannelMessages). Includes debug mode for detailed logging of message filtering.
